CREATE TABLE test_vectors (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, vec_array VECTOR);
INSERT INTO test_vectors (vec_array) VALUES (vector_concat(vector(NULL, 'foo'), vector('bar', vector('nested1', 'nested2'))));
SELECT vector_concat(vec_array, vector('end')) FROM test_vectors WHERE id = 1;
SELECT vector_concat(vec_array) FROM test_vectors WHERE vec_array IS NOT NULL;
SELECT vector_concat(vector_concat(vector('X', 'Y'), vector('Z')), vector('A', 'B')) AS concatenated_vector FROM test_vectors;
SELECT vector_concat(vector(1, 2), vector(3, 4), vector_concat(vector(5, 6), vector(7, 'eight'))) FROM test_vectors WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT vector_concat(vector('start'), vector_concat(vec_array), vector('finish')) AS full_vector FROM test_vectors;
CREATE VIEW concatenated_vectors AS SELECT id, vector_concat(vec_array) AS concatenated FROM test_vectors;
SELECT * FROM concatenated_vectors WHERE concatenated IS NOT NULL;
DELETE FROM test_vectors WHERE vec_array = vector_concat(vector(1, 2), vector(3));
